summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin Tenant Management features. All 18 test cases from the request passed. Backend APIs 100% functional (12/12 pytest tests passed). Frontend UI fully operational with all workflows tested via Playwright.
passed_tests: 1. Login as Super Admin (admin@talentops.com / admin123) - verified role is super_admin ✓
2. Sidebar: 'Tenants' nav item visible for super_admin only ✓
3. Navigate to /admin/tenants - verified platform stats cards (Total Companies, Active, Total Users, Total Employees) ✓
4. Plan distribution cards show Free Trial, Starter, Professional, Enterprise with counts ✓
5. Tenants table shows all companies with columns: Company, Admin, Plan, Employees, Status, Actions ✓
6. Click View (eye icon) - verified detail modal shows org info, users list, enabled features ✓
7. Click Create Company button - verified dialog opens with Company Name, Domain, Industry, Plan, Admin Name/Email/Password fields ✓
8. Create a new company 'UI_Test_Company' with admin on Starter plan - verified success ✓
9. New company appears in the table with correct plan and admin email ✓
10. Change plan dropdown from Starter to Enterprise - verified toast and plan updates ✓
11. Click Suspend (power icon) - verified status changes to 'Suspended' ✓
12. Click Activate again - verified status back to 'Active' ✓
13. Backend: POST /api/admin/impersonate/{acme_org_id} - verified returns admin user session for Acme Corp ✓
14. Login as new admin - verified empty dashboard (no other org data) ✓
15. Login as HR (hr@acmecorp.com / password123) - verified only Acme data visible, no /admin/tenants in sidebar ✓
16. Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns correct total_orgs count after creating new company ✓
17. Backend: GET /api/admin/tenants returns list with all orgs including newly created companies ✓

test_credentials.hr_admin: hr@acmecorp.com / password123 (role: admin, Acme Corporation, org_id: 95e97e99-55d5-4f38-bcbd-72fdcebe3fbb)

seed_data_verified.organizations: 5 total (Acme Corporation, Test Organization, TechStartup Inc, TEST_GlobalTech, UI_Test_Company)

mocked_api.payment_gateway: Razorpay payment is MOCKED - instant verification without real payment

context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Tenant Management fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/tenants (list all), GET /api/admin/tenants/{org_id} (details), POST /api/admin/tenants (create), PUT /api/admin/tenants/{org_id}/status (toggle), PUT /api/admin/tenants/{org_id}/plan (change plan), POST /api/admin/impersonate/{org_id} (impersonate), GET /api/admin/stats (platform stats). All require super_admin role. Non-super-admin gets 403. Sidebar shows 'Tenants' nav only for super_admin. TenantsPage.js has data-testid attributes: create-tenant-btn, view-{org_id}, toggle-{org_id}, impersonate-{org_id}, plan-select-{org_id}, stat-orgs, stat-active, stat-users, stat-employees.

tenant_management.list_tenants: GET /api/admin/tenants returns all orgs with employee_count, user_count, admin_email
tenant_management.tenant_details: GET /api/admin/tenants/{org_id} returns org info, users list, plan_info with features
tenant_management.create_tenant: POST /api/admin/tenants creates org + admin user + leave policy
tenant_management.impersonate: POST /api/admin/impersonate/{org_id} sets cookies as org admin
tenant_management.platform_stats: GET /api/admin/stats returns total_orgs, active_orgs, total_users, total_employees, plan_distribution

access_control.sidebar_visibility: Tenants nav only visible for super_admin role

data_isolation.org_scoped_data: Each org sees only their own employees, leaves, payroll

ui_components.stats_cards: 4 cards: Total Companies, Active Companies, Total Users, Total Employees
ui_components.plan_distribution: 4 cards showing count per plan with USD prices
ui_components.tenants_table: Columns: Company, Admin, Plan, Employees, Status, Actions
ui_components.detail_modal: Shows org info, users list, enabled features
ui_components.create_dialog: Form with Company Name, Domain, Industry, Plan, Admin Name/Email/Password
